subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him, the Intended One, the Lord of the unseen and the visible, the Manifestation of Names and Attributes, Who through one exalted Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصود را مالک غیب و شهود را مظهر اسماء و صفات را که بیک کلمه علیا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Word of God the cause of creation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
